title: Boi canh phap ly khi nghe si bi nghi lien quan den chat cam
content: Bai bao cung cap boi canh ve viec nguoi cua cong chung can than trong voi hanh vi su dung trai phep chat ma tuy. Noi dung ket noi giua tin tuc va phap luat, giup pipeline hybrid retrieval co the tra ve ca nguon legal lan nguon news. Phan bo sung: khi cau hoi lien quan den hinh phat, pipeline nen uu tien van ban phap luat; khi cau hoi lien quan den vu viec truyen thong, pipeline co the dung tin tuc va van ban phap luat de can bang cau tra loi.
